mapper.sql: l.id AS retrievalLogId, l.session_id AS sessionId, l.user_message_id AS userMessageId, l.assistant_message_id AS assistantMessageId, s.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.display_name AS displayName, s.course_id AS courseId, c.course_name AS courseName, s.knowledge_base_id AS knowledgeBaseId, kb.name AS knowledgeBaseName, l.index_run_id AS indexRunId, s.title AS sessionTitle, s.session_type AS sessionType, s.status AS sessionStatus, l.query_mode AS queryMode, l.task_status AS taskStatus, l.progress_stage AS progressStage, l.retrieval_status AS retrievalStatus, l.error_message AS errorMessage, l.original_query_text AS originalQueryText, l.retrieval_query_text AS retrievalQueryText, l.standalone_query_text AS standaloneQueryText, l.context_snapshot_text AS generationContext, l.context_snapshot_text AS contextSnapshotText, l.context_strategy AS contextStrategy, l.context_message_range AS contextMessageRange, l.context_char_count AS contextCharCount, l.rewrite_applied AS rewriteApplied, l.rewrite_reason AS rewriteReason, l.rewrite_method AS rewriteMethod, l.rewrite_model AS rewriteModel, l.rewrite_confidence AS rewriteConfidence, l.routing_confidence AS routingConfidence, l.routing_confidence_band AS routingConfidenceBand, l.routing_review_priority AS routingReviewPriority, l.routing_snapshot_json AS routingSnapshotJson, l.memory_applied AS memoryApplied, l.memory_strategy AS memoryStrategy, l.memory_scope AS memoryScope, l.memory_source_count AS memorySourceCount, l.memory_size_chars AS memorySizeChars, l.query_engine_strategy AS queryEngineStrategy, l.history_fallback_reason AS historyFallbackReason, l.created_at AS createdAt, l.started_at AS startedAt, l.last_heartbeat_at AS lastHeartbeatAt, l.finished_at AS finishedAt, CASE WHEN l.finished_at IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MICROSECOND, COALESCE(l.started_at, l.created_at), l.finished_at) DIV 1000 ELSE NULL END AS durationMs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qa_retrieval_hits h WHERE h.retrieval_log_id = l.id) AS sourceCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qa_message_feedback f WHERE f.retrieval_log_id = l.id AND f.rating = 'helpful') AS helpfulCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qa_message_feedback f WHERE f.retrieval_log_id = l.id AND f.rating = 'unhelpful') AS unhelpfulCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qa_message_feedback f WHERE f.retrieval_log_id = l.id AND f.rating = 'needs_improvement') AS needsImprovementCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qa_message_feedback f WHERE f.retrieval_log_id = l.id AND CAST(f.tags AS CHAR) LIKE '%source_irrelevant%') AS sourceIssueCount, am.content AS assistantContent
, l.semantic_state_version AS semanticStateVersion, l.semantic_state_json AS semanticStateJson

FROM qa_retrieval_logs l JOIN qa_sessions s ON s.id = l.session_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.course_id = s.course_id LEFT JOIN knowledge_bases kb ON kb.id = s.knowledge_base_id LEFT JOIN qa_messages am ON am.id = l.assistant_message_id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN l.task_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success, SUM(CASE WHEN l.task_status IN ('failed', 'stale') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN l.routing_confidence_band = 'low_confidence' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lowConfidence, SUM(CASE WHEN l.routing_review_priority IS NOT NULL AND l.routing_review_priority <> '' AND l.routing_review_priority <> 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS needReview

SELECT
WHERE l.id = #{retrievalLogId}
AND ( c.access_policy = 'public' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_memberships cm WHERE cm.course_id = s.course_id AND cm.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND cm.status = 'active' AND (cm.effective_from IS NULL OR cm.effective_from <= NOW()) AND (cm.effective_to IS NULL OR cm.effective_to > NOW()) AND (cm.expires_at IS NULL OR cm.expires_at > NOW()) ) )
LIMIT 1

SELECT h.id AS id, h.retrieval_log_id AS retrievalLogId, h.rank_position AS rankPosition, h.document_key AS documentKey, h.chunk_id AS chunkId, h.source_type AS sourceType, h.source_ref AS sourceRef, h.source_file AS sourceFile, h.heading_path AS headingPath, h.page_start AS pageStart, h.page_end AS pageEnd, h.snippet AS snippet, h.score AS score FROM qa_retrieval_hits h WHERE h.retrieval_log_id = #{retrievalLogId} ORDER BY h.rank_position ASC, h.id ASC
